label: Train a Basic Neural Network
description: Implement, train, and evaluate a feedforward neural network from scratch using a modern deep learning framework.
unlock_criteria: Train a network on a real dataset, achieve a reported baseline metric, and publish the code or notebook.

label: Implement a Transformer
description: Build a transformer architecture from scratch: multi-head attention, positional encoding, feed-forward layers, and training loop.
unlock_criteria: Publish a working transformer implementation with training code, a README, and a performance benchmark on a standard task.

label: Fine-tune an LLM
description: Adapt a pretrained language model to a new task or domain using supervised fine-tuning (SFT), LoRA, or PEFT methods.
unlock_criteria: Fine-tune a model (e.g., Llama, Mistral) on a custom dataset, report eval metrics, and publish code or weights.

label: Evaluate an LLM
description: Design and run evaluations for language models: benchmark selection, prompt design, metric choice, and failure mode analysis.
unlock_criteria: Publish an eval suite for a model with documented methodology, results, and interpretation.

label: Build an AI Agent
description: Design and implement an LLM-based agent with tool use, a memory strategy, and a multi-step task loop.
unlock_criteria: Deploy an agent that successfully completes a defined multi-step task. Publish the code and a task log.

label: Multi-Agent Coordination
description: Design systems where multiple AI agents coordinate to complete complex tasks: orchestrators, subagents, handoffs, and shared memory.
unlock_criteria: Build and demonstrate a working multi-agent system with at least two cooperating agents completing a task neither could complete alone.

label: Red-Team an LLM
description: Systematically probe a language model for safety failures, jailbreaks, hallucinations, and misuse vectors.
unlock_criteria: Publish a structured red-team report for a model with documented attack categories, prompt examples, and findings.

label: Evaluate Alignment
description: Design and run alignment-specific evaluations: helpfulness, harmlessness, honesty, and refusal calibration.
unlock_criteria: Publish an alignment eval methodology with documented criteria, results, and open questions.

label: Calculate an Orbit
description: Compute orbital elements from state vectors, propagate an orbit, and analyze coverage or ground track.
unlock_criteria: Compute and validate orbital elements for a real satellite from TLE data. Publish the code and verification.

label: Plan a Mission Trajectory
description: Design a mission trajectory from launch to destination, including delta-v budget, maneuver sequencing, and margin analysis.
unlock_criteria: Design a complete trajectory for a reference mission (e.g., LEO to GEO transfer). Publish the analysis.

label: Size a Propulsion System
description: Select and size a propulsion system for a given mission delta-v, spacecraft mass, and thrust requirement.
unlock_criteria: Size a propulsion system for a reference spacecraft and document the trade study with mass and performance margins.

label: Design a CubeSat Mission
description: Define requirements, concept of operations, subsystem sizing, and launch vehicle selection for a 1U–12U CubeSat mission.
unlock_criteria: Produce a mission concept document (equivalent to a Phase A study) with ConOps, budget allocations, and risk log.

label: Evaluate a Longevity Intervention
description: Critically assess the evidence quality, mechanism, and translational relevance of a proposed longevity intervention.
unlock_criteria: Publish a structured evidence review of a specific longevity intervention with mechanism, study quality, and translational assessment.

label: Design a Cognitive Experiment
description: Design a well-controlled behavioral or cognitive experiment with defined hypotheses, measures, controls, and analysis plan.
unlock_criteria: Design and document a cognitive experiment protocol with pre-registration or equivalent methodological rigor.

label: Conduct a User Interview
description: Plan, conduct, and synthesize user interviews to surface jobs-to-be-done, pain points, and existing behaviors.
unlock_criteria: Conduct 5+ interviews, synthesize findings into a documented insight report, and share key learnings publicly.

label: Write a Product Spec
description: Define a product or feature through a written spec: problem statement, user stories, success criteria, and non-goals.
unlock_criteria: Publish a product spec for a real feature. The spec must include problem statement, users, success metrics, and explicit non-goals.

label: Ship an MVP
description: Define, build, and launch a minimum viable product. Get it in front of real users and collect feedback.
unlock_criteria: Launch a working product, share a public URL or download, and document at least 3 user feedback points.

label: Write a High-Signal Post
description: Produce a written piece that clearly communicates a non-obvious insight, earns attention from a target audience, and drives action.
unlock_criteria: Publish a post with documented audience reach and at least one concrete response (reply, share, or downstream action) from someone you did not know.

label: Grow an Audience
description: Build a consistent, engaged audience through repeated high-signal content across one or more channels.
unlock_criteria: Demonstrate 3-month consistent growth in a documented audience channel with engagement metrics.

label: Build a Financial Model
description: Create a bottom-up financial model with unit economics, revenue drivers, cost structure, and scenario analysis.
unlock_criteria: Publish a financial model template or a documented model for a real business with at least three scenarios.
